---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior in RUN Remix
title: 'bug: '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, screenshots, or console output.

## Environment

- **RUN Remix Version:** (check `package.json` — should be 3.x)
- **Node.js Version:** (run `node --version` — must be ≥24)
- **Browser:** (if frontend issue)
- **OS:**

## Port Check

- [ ] Server is running on port 5002 (`npm run verify:tech-integrity` passes)

## Reproduction

- [ ] I can reproduce this consistently
- [ ] This happens intermittently

## Additional Context

Any other context, related issues, or links.
